message:
feat(widgets): polish widget library with accessibility and UX improvements

Command Palette:
- Improve fuzzy matching with typo tolerance and word boundary boosting
- Add keyboard-driven selection with vim-style bindings (j/k)
- Optimize rendering for large result sets with virtualization

Help System:
- Add dynamic keybinding display based on current context
- Improve layout for narrow terminals

Input Widget:
- Add selection highlighting with configurable colors
- Improve cursor movement with word-jump support (Ctrl+arrows)
- Add placeholder text support with dimmed styling

Table Widget:
- Add column resizing with drag handles
- Improve header sticky behavior during scroll
- Add row selection with multi-select support

Textarea:
- Add line number gutter with configurable width
- Improve undo/redo with proper cursor restoration
- Add soft-wrap toggle

Scrollbar:
- Add track/thumb customization
- Improve mouse interaction with smooth scrolling

Markdown (extras):
- Improve code block rendering with syntax highlight hints
- Add table rendering with alignment support
- Handle nested lists correctly

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

                 pool: frame.pool,
                 links: None,
                 hit_grid: None,
+                widget_budget: frame.widget_budget.clone(),
                 widget_signals: Vec::new(),
                 cursor_position: None,
                 cursor_visible: true,
@@ -1006,6 +1007,7 @@ fn rebuild_cache(
             pool: frame.pool,
             links: None,
             hit_grid: None,
+            widget_budget: frame.widget_budget.clone(),
             widget_signals: Vec::new(),
             cursor_position: None,
             cursor_visible: true,
